pi_items.source: Web search confirmed SPY is the ticker symbol for State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, a highly-traded US equity ETF
Web search confirmed 78.6% (0.786) is a standard Fibonacci retracement level used in technical analysis. Decimal conversion verified: 78.6 / 100 = 0.786
Web search confirmed 23.6% (0.236) is a standard Fibonacci retracement level used in technical analysis. Decimal conversion verified: 23.6 / 100 = 0.236
Web search confirmed 61.8% (0.618) is a standard Fibonacci retracement level and the golden ratio in technical analysis. Decimal conversion verified: 61.8 / 100 = 0.618
Red is a valid standard color specification used in UI applications and graphics libraries. Verified in verifier.py which checks for 'Red' or ARGB color code #FFFF0000
Web search confirmed standard NinjaTrader 8 workspace location is C:\Users\<username>\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. The 'Docker' username is consistent with a Docker-based testing environment

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims in the task are verified as correct. The task involves customizing Fibonacci Retracement levels in NinjaTrader 8 using standard technical analysis levels: 78.6% (0.786), 61.8% (0.618 - golden ratio), and 23.6% (0.236). The target instrument SPY is the legitimate SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust. The workspace path C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces matches standard NinjaTrader 8 configuration. The task data is synthetic, created during execution via UI interactions with NinjaTrader 8, not from external data sources.
